mapper.sql: rh.id, rh.employee_id, rh.resident_name AS employee_name, rh.gender, rh.department_id, dp.name AS department_name, d.id AS dormitory_id, d.name AS dormitory_name, rh.room_id, rm.name AS room_number, rh.check_in_date AS checkin_date, rh.check_out_date AS checkout_date, rh.planned_checkout_date, DATEDIFF(IFNULL(rh.check_out_date, CURDATE()), rh.check_in_date) AS stay_days, CASE WHEN rh.check_out_date IS NULL THEN 'active' ELSE 'checked_out' END AS status, rh.is_responsible, rh.remarks AS remark, rh.version, rh.created_at, rh.updated_at
mapper.select:
SELECT FROM residence_histories rh LEFT JOIN rooms rm ON rm.id = rh.room_id AND rm.deleted_at IS NULL LEFT JOIN dormitories d ON d.id = rm.dormitory_id AND d.deleted_at IS NULL LEFT JOIN departments dp ON dp.id = rh.department_id AND dp.deleted_at IS NULL WHERE rh.deleted_at IS NULL
AND (rh.resident_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR rh.employee_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
AND rh.check_in_date > CURDATE()
AND rh.check_in_date <= CURDATE() AND (rh.check_out_date IS NULL OR rh.check_out_date >= CURDATE())
AND rh.check_out_date IS NOT NULL AND rh.check_out_date < CURDATE()
AND d.id = #{dormitoryId}
ORDER BY rh.created_at DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{pageSize}

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM residence_histories rh LEFT JOIN rooms rm ON rm.id = rh.room_id AND rm.deleted_at IS NULL LEFT JOIN dormitories d ON d.id = rm.dormitory_id AND d.deleted_at IS NULL WHERE rh.deleted_at IS NULL
AND (rh.resident_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR rh.employee_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
AND rh.check_in_date > CURDATE()
AND rh.check_in_date <= CURDATE() AND (rh.check_out_date IS NULL OR rh.check_out_date >= CURDATE())
AND rh.check_out_date IS NOT NULL AND rh.check_out_date < CURDATE()
AND d.id = #{dormitoryId}

SELECT FROM residence_histories rh LEFT JOIN rooms rm ON rm.id = rh.room_id AND rm.deleted_at IS NULL LEFT JOIN dormitories d ON d.id = rm.dormitory_id AND d.deleted_at IS NULL LEFT JOIN departments dp ON dp.id = rh.department_id AND dp.deleted_at IS NULL WHERE rh.id = #{id} AND rh.deleted_at IS NULL

SELECT id, employee_id, gender, room_id, department_id, resident_name, check_in_date, check_out_date, planned_checkout_date, is_responsible, remarks, version, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at FROM residence_histories WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL

SELECT rh.id, rh.employee_id, rh.gender, rh.resident_name, rh.department_id, dp.name AS department_name, rh.room_id, rm.name AS room_name, d.id AS dormitory_id, d.name AS dormitory_name, rh.check_in_date, rh.check_out_date, rh.planned_checkout_date, rh.is_responsible, rh.remarks, rh.version, rh.created_at, rh.updated_at FROM residence_histories rh LEFT JOIN rooms rm ON rm.id = rh.room_id AND rm.deleted_at IS NULL LEFT JOIN dormitories d ON d.id = rm.dormitory_id AND d.deleted_at IS NULL LEFT JOIN departments dp ON dp.id = rh.department_id AND dp.deleted_at IS NULL WHERE rh.id = #{id} AND rh.deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO residence_histories (employee_id, gender, room_id, department_id, resident_name, check_in_date, check_out_date, planned_checkout_date, is_responsible, remarks, version, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{employeeId}, #{gender}, #{roomId}, #{departmentId}, #{residentName}, #{checkInDate}, #{checkOutDate}, #{plannedCheckoutDate}, #{isResponsible}, #{remarks}, #{version}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE residence_histories SET employee_id = #{employeeId}, gender = #{gender}, room_id = #{roomId}, department_id = #{departmentId}, resident_name = #{residentName}, check_in_date = #{checkInDate}, check_out_date = #{checkOutDate}, planned_checkout_date = #{plannedCheckoutDate}, is_responsible = #{isResponsible}, remarks = #{remarks}, version = version + 1, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND version = #{version} AND deleted_at IS NULL

UPDATE residence_histories SET check_out_date = #{checkoutDate}, remarks = CASE WHEN #{remark} IS NOT NULL THEN #{remark} ELSE remarks END, version = version + 1, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND version = #{version} AND check_out_date IS NULL AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE residence_histories SET deleted_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.select: SELECT rh.employee_id, rh.resident_name AS employee_name, rh.gender, rh.department_id, dp.name AS department_name FROM residence_histories rh LEFT JOIN departments dp ON dp.id = rh.department_id AND dp.deleted_at IS NULL WHERE rh.employee_id = #{employeeId} AND rh.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY rh.created_at DESC LIMIT 0, 1

SELECT rh.id, rh.employee_id, rh.resident_name AS employee_name, d.name AS dormitory_name, rm.name AS room_number, rh.check_in_date AS checkin_date, IFNULL(rh.check_out_date, rh.planned_checkout_date) AS planned_checkout_date, DATEDIFF(IFNULL(rh.check_out_date, rh.planned_checkout_date), CURDATE()) AS days_until_checkout, dp.name AS department_name FROM residence_histories rh LEFT JOIN rooms rm ON rm.id = rh.room_id AND rm.deleted_at IS NULL LEFT JOIN dormitories d ON d.id = rm.dormitory_id AND d.deleted_at IS NULL LEFT JOIN departments dp ON dp.id = rh.department_id AND dp.deleted_at IS NULL WHERE rh.deleted_at IS NULL AND rh.check_in_date <= CURDATE() AND ( (rh.check_out_date IS NULL AND rh.planned_checkout_date IS NOT NULL AND rh.planned_checkout_date BETWEEN CURDATE() AND DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY)) OR (rh.check_out_date IS NOT NULL AND rh.check_out_date >= CURDATE() AND rh.check_out_date <= DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY)) ) ORDER BY IFNULL(rh.check_out_date, rh.planned_checkout_date) ASC

SELECT 'warning' AS type, COUNT(1) AS cnt FROM residence_histories rh WHERE rh.deleted_at IS NULL AND rh.check_out_date IS NULL AND DATEDIFF(CURDATE(), rh.check_in_date) BETWEEN #{warningDays} AND #{criticalDays} - 1 UNION ALL SELECT 'critical' AS type, COUNT(1) AS cnt FROM residence_histories rh WHERE rh.deleted_at IS NULL AND rh.check_out_date IS NULL AND DATEDIFF(CURDATE(), rh.check_in_date) >= #{criticalDays} UNION ALL SELECT 'withdrawal' AS type, COUNT(1) AS cnt FROM residence_histories rh WHERE rh.deleted_at IS NULL AND rh.check_out_date IS NULL AND rh.planned_checkout_date IS NOT NULL AND rh.planned_checkout_date BETWEEN CURDATE() AND DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL #{withdrawDays} DAY)
SELECT MAX(rh.employee_id) FROM residence_histories rh WHERE rh.deleted_at IS NULL AND rh.employee_id LIKE CONCAT(#{prefix}, '%')
